page_content:
Recommended: BMGT302.

BMGT404 Essential Data Skills for Business Analytics (3 Credits) Building on prior programming knowledge, this course introduces principles of data science to collect, analyze, and visualize business data. Students will explore application of business analytics in areas such as finance, accounting, marketing, and operations. This course especially emphasizes learning by doing exercises using a modern, high- level programming language and industry standard software. Prerequisite: BMGT302.

Credit Only Granted for. BMGT404 or CMSC320.

Additional Information: CMSC majors will not receive credit for this course towards their upper level concentration in their CMSC major.
